In the "Neurotechnology and Bioinformatics Laboratory" at our university, our students have the opportunity to practice in the studies to be carried out in the field of neuroscience.

Raw EEG data are collected with the EEG Emotiv Epoc Neuroheadset SDK in the laboratory, and following the noise removal step, the pre-classification features of the signal are extracted with feature extraction methods.

With the optimization algorithms used to increase the classification performance, our students have the opportunity to work on the solutions of problems in different disciplines with engineering methods.
